journeys.label: New to Aeonis? Read this path

docs.title: Learn to Play (draft)
docs.description: Teaching rulebook draft for First Playable: setup, round walkthrough, combat, council, scoring.

docs.title: Player Aid
docs.description: Quick reference: round sequence, action costs, unit stats, combat steps, vote math.

docs.title: First Playable Packet
docs.description: Minimal playtest ruleset: setup, reduced decks, objectives, and Lord sheets.

docs.title: M5 Agent Playtest Sprint
docs.description: Executed plan for engine-bounded qualitative agents, privacy, safe fallback, and evidence gates.

docs.title: M5 Agent Pipeline Dry Run
docs.description: Deterministic two-game, six-seat orchestration check; explicitly not qualitative evidence.

docs.title: M5 Local-Model Agent Pilot
docs.description: Three-persona local-model playtest with sampled decisions, reflections, interviews, and reliability evidence.

docs.title: Rules & Systems Index
docs.description: Rulebook draft table of contents and design red flags.

docs.title: Round Structure
docs.description: Canonical timing spine for a full round and its windows.

docs.title: Actions
docs.description: Action Point pool, rotating turns, passing, and action costs.

docs.title: Strategy
docs.description: Strategy cards: initiative order, primaries and secondaries.

docs.title: Movement
docs.description: AP-based movement, terrain costs, portals, and council tie-ins.

docs.title: Tiles
docs.description: Terrain production, special tiles, and borders/ZOC framework.

docs.title: Map Construction
docs.description: PROPOSED slice geometry and setup modes for 3–8 players (Plan 4 draft).

docs.title: Combat
docs.description: Battle line + reserves, sieges, and anti-doomstack constraints.

docs.title: Arcane
docs.description: Tiered Arcane Discoveries by school, costs, and timing.

docs.title: Population
docs.description: Population pool/cap, growth, and how it limits expansion.

docs.title: Buildings
docs.description: Full building roster: production, military, advanced, and 8 Legendary faction capstones.

docs.title: Trade
docs.description: Player-initiated Trade (AP); Population not tradeable. Upkeep owned elsewhere.

docs.title: Events
docs.description: Exploration/global/local/milestone events and examples.

docs.title: Whispers
docs.description: Whisper Cards: Speaking Stone intelligence, timing windows, and tactical one-shots.

docs.title: Artifacts
docs.description: Artifact deck, Remnant acquisition, three artifact categories, and VP-bearing relics.

docs.title: Objectives
docs.description: Stage I/II public objective decks, secret objectives, draw rules, and scoring timing.

docs.title: High Council
docs.description: Motions, lobbying, voting, laws/decrees/titles, and timing.

docs.title: Renown
docs.description: Renown gains/uses/thresholds and how fame changes the table.

docs.title: Victory
docs.description: VP sources: objectives, titles, artifacts, throne, and variants.

docs.title: Setting Lore (rules)
docs.description: World hooks: Speaking Stones, rediscovered magic, throne, and banished lords.

docs.title: Diplomacy
docs.description: Deals, binding transactions, alliances, ceasefires, and how promises work at the table.

docs.title: Advanced Units
docs.description: Faction elite and mythic units: unlock gates, recruiting, upkeep, and limits.

docs.title: Cassian — Merchant Prince
docs.description: Golden Consortium: off-turn trade, binding vote contracts, Influence leverage.

docs.title: Elyndra — Warden of Groves
docs.description: Verdant Covenant: a private Forest network, defensive terrain, attrition wars.

docs.title: Seraphel — Lord of the Arcane
docs.description: Arcanum Concord: virtual sigils, paired Research actions, Arcane tempo.

docs.title: Vharok — Lord of Steel
docs.description: Iron Dominion: every built hex becomes a bastion, durable fronts, long sieges.

docs.title: Rakhis — The Sandlord
docs.description: Windsworn Horde: ZOC-free movement, desert mastery, hit-and-run raids.

docs.title: Nyxara — The Veiled
docs.description: The Silent Court: Whisper manipulation, espionage, surgical strikes.

docs.title: Auriel — Voice of the World Tree
docs.description: Radiant Accord: sanctified motions, doubled votes, Renown, defensive auras.

docs.title: Thal'rik — The Gatekeeper
docs.description: The Threshold: portal control, teleportation, map-wide presence.

docs.title: Serathis — The Tidecaller
docs.description: The Drowned Court (expansion roster): lakes as fortresses, water movement, bridge control.

docs.title: Morvane — The Deathless
docs.description: The Pale Legion (expansion roster): necromancy, raising the fallen, population sacrifice.

docs.title: Tsuvara — Mother of Wagons
docs.description: The Endless Caravan (expansion roster): a mobile home city, migration, adaptability.

docs.title: Ozren — The Unveiled Flame
docs.description: The Ashen Creed (expansion roster): conversion, Influence warfare, religious schism.

docs.title: Lorebook
docs.description: History, factions, locations, and myths of Aeonis (lore draft).

docs.title: Naming Bible
docs.description: Canonical terms, faction and race names, regions, naming conventions, pronunciation.

docs.title: Components Checklist
docs.description: Physical components list for the first playable build.

docs.title: First Playable Print-and-Play Kit
docs.description: Ready-to-print low-ink PDFs, assembly instructions, inventory gates, and regeneration workflow.

docs.title: Plan 5 / M4 Foundation Report
docs.description: Core-Lord parity promotion, M4 stability results, and remaining full-M4 scope.

docs.title: M4 Full Encode Gate
docs.description: 100-game M4 Lord-asymmetry gate: unique tiles, abilities, discoveries, Legendary Buildings.

docs.title: Synchronization + PnP Readiness Sprint
docs.description: Canon synchronization audit and verification record for the 45-page First Playable print-and-play kit.

docs.title: Post-M4 Rebaseline + Pacing
docs.description: M4-on mixed 4/6/8p baselines; economist H8 pass; Lever A accepted (6–8 rounds); default-on still deferred.

docs.title: M4 Lord × Persona Sweep
docs.description: Historical pre-Dial-3 Lord/persona sweep retained as tuning context for the later default-on decision.

docs.title: M4 Default-On Review
docs.description: 520-game matched canonical-stack review; promotes full Lord asymmetry to the simulator default.

docs.title: 8-Player Economist Diagnosis
docs.description: Full audited deck vs six-card row; objective access is primary, Lord fit amplifies, and no economy knob is promoted.

docs.title: Rakhis Ladder Dial 1
docs.description: Removed Oasis Cavalry −1 Gold; weak lever (~51%→49.5% solo); recommend Hit and Run next.

docs.title: Rakhis Ladder Dial 2
docs.description: Hit and Run once/game; solo ~48.5%; warmonger eased; recommend Sandstride Dial 3.

docs.title: Rakhis Ladder Dial 3
docs.description: Sandstride ZOC ignore removed; solo ~43%; mixed 4p ~27.5%; first material lever.

docs.title: Rakhis Ladder Dial 3b
docs.description: Pre-Pre-Strike retreat cut tried and reverted (regressed vs Dial 3).

docs.title: Plan 1 Pre-Strike Mixed Ladder
docs.description: M4-on mixed 4/6/8p baseline vs pre_strike; do not promote (6–8p still hot).

docs.title: Plan 3 Public Objectives Audit
docs.description: 24-card shared-row audit; 130/130 complete; accepted pacing and objective-share gates; promote.

docs.title: Plan 4 Geometry + Plan 1 Spacing
docs.description: 1,200-map geometry gate; corrected home spacing resolves 6p/8p attacker heat and freezes a 91-tile BOM.

docs.title: Plan 2 AP + Plan 6 Bookkeeping
docs.description: 910-game AP/bookkeeping ladder; rejects cap, Rally, and slim Renown; promotes no building upkeep.
